name: Sai Krishna Koleti
about: Aspiring AI Engineer with hands-on experience in Python, LangChain, RAG, Vector Databases, and LLM applications. Currently working as a Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services and building Generative AI applications.

description: Worked on application monitoring using AppDynamics
Supported development of Generative AI applications
Developed front-end components using HTML, CSS and JavaScript
Improved user experience through responsive web development

projects.title: Groq Chatbot
projects.description: A simple chatbot using Groq, users can adjust the temperaure and tokens,also select different models from the provided list

projects.title: Conversational PDF Q&A Chatbot using RAG and LangChain
projects.description: Developed a conversational AI chatbot that allows users to chat with PDF documents using RAG, LangChain and Vector Databases with chat history support.

projects.title: AI SQL Assistant using LangChain Agents and SQL Toolkit
projects.description: Created an AI-powered SQL assistant using LangChain agents and SQL toolkit to interact with databases using natural language queries.

projects.title: Search Engine using LangChain Tools and Agents
projects.description: Implemented a search engine application using LangChain tools and agents for intelligent information retrieval and automated query handling.

projects.title: RAG-based Document Question Answering using Llama3 and Groq API
projects.description: Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation application using Llama3 and Groq API to answer questions from uploaded documents.

projects.title: Text Summarization with LangChain
projects.description: Built a text summarization application using LangChain and LLMs.
